about.title: About me
about.p1: I'm a frontend developer passionate about creating beautiful and functional interfaces. With experience in React, Next.js, and TypeScript, I turn ideas into digital products that delight users.
about.p2: I believe good code is clean, accessible, and performant code. I'm constantly learning new technologies and improving my skills to deliver better solutions.

contact.title: Contact
